# appPermissionsGetByMask

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Reads and enables pagination through a set of `AppPermission`.

## Usage

```typescript
useAppPermissionsGetByMaskQuery({ mask: '<value>', first: '<value>', offset: '<value>', after: '<value>' })
```

## Examples

### Use useAppPermissionsGetByMaskQuery

```typescript
const { data, isLoading } = useAppPermissionsGetByMaskQuery({ mask: '<value>', first: '<value>', offset: '<value>', after: '<value>' });
```
